content.full_text:
Town of Moraga

2100 DONALD DRIVE
P.O. BOX 158
MORAGA, CA 94556
(415) 376-2590

Rosa G. Hubbard
Town Manager

November 21, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA  95814

Dear Sirs,

     Enclosed are two publications which are routinely
mailed to the 6,000 households within the Town of Moraga.
There has been a question about the placement of names of
Town Council Members in these publications based on the
mass mailing regulations.

     As you can see, we have traditionally used a
letterhead format for the yellow newsletter.  However, the
recreation brochure is totally redesigned each quarter and
does not resemble the normal letterhead format.  Both
publications are prepared by the Town staff without direct
input from members of the Town Council.

     Please advise whether the names of Council members may
be listed in the recreation brochure, and other similar
publications, along with names of the appointed park and
recreation commissioners and staff members.  Your review
and reply would be most appreciated.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        [signature]
                                        Ross G. Hubbard
                                        Town Manager

cc:  Town Council
     Cherie Grant

sections.question: Please advise whether the names of Council members may be listed in the recreation brochure, and other similar publications, along with names of the appointed park and recreation commissioners and staff members.

sections.question_synthetic: May the Town of Moraga list the names of City Council members in quarterly recreation brochures and similar publications alongside park/recreation commissioners and staff members, given mass mailing regulations?
sections.parsing_notes: Format: ocr; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from Town Manager to FPPC, not an FPPC response. No CONCLUSION or SHORT ANSWER section present. OCR quality is poor but content is mostly legible. Document concerns mass mailing regulations and use of official names in municipal publications.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: Please advise whether the names of Council members may be listed in the recreation brochure, and other similar publications, along with names of the appointed park and recreation commissioners and staff members.

embedding.summary: The Town of Moraga inquires whether council member names may be listed in a quarterly recreation brochure distributed to 6,000 households, along with names of appointed commissioners and staff, given mass mailing regulations under the Political Reform Act.
